summary: Completed comprehensive backend and frontend testing of Emergent Atendimentos system. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - login, dashboard with Google Sheets badge, new chamado creation with pedido search, and Google Sheets sync all verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0
ui_bugs.impact: Charts display correctly but generate console warnings

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with Google Sheets Conectado badge visible
Pedido search by Entrega #117844750 returns full pedido data
Pedido data auto-fills client name, CPF, product, transportadora, and canal
Create new chamado (atendimento) with categoria and motivo
Response contains google_sheets_sync: queued on chamado creation
Backend logs confirm atendimentos synced to Google Sheets (ATD-2026-003,004,005)
Chamados list displays all created atendimentos
Dashboard statistics show correct counts (5 Pendentes, 1 Resolvido)
API authentication working (protected endpoints require token)
seed_data_creation: Test pedido #117844750 used from existing Base_Emergent data. Test chamados ATD-2026-003,004,005 created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Sheets integration is REAL and working. Atendimentos are synced to spreadsheet 1cqzY_i1lqvu8sySPFrMtucQfyTo1LYm04ZpxRZNDCBs. Test user test@emergent.com with password test123 is available. Pedido #117844750 is a valid test pedido with full ERP data.
